mapper.select: SELECT sc.course_id AS courseId, sc.course_name AS courseName, COALESCE(sc.progress_percentage, 0) AS progressPercentage FROM student_course sc WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} AND sc.learning_status = 'STUDYING' ORDER BY sc.progress_percentage DESC

SELECT HOUR(COALESCE(start_time, created_time)) AS hour, SUM(duration) AS studyTime FROM learning_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY HOUR(COALESCE(start_time, created_time)) ORDER BY hour ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM homework_submission WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'DRAFT')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) FROM homework h INNER JOIN student_course sc ON sc.course_id = h.course_id WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} AND sc.learning_status != 'DROPPED' AND h.status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT hs.homework_id) FROM homework_submission hs INNER JOIN homework h ON h.id = hs.homework_id INNER JOIN student_course sc ON sc.course_id = h.course_id WHERE hs.student_id = #{studentId} AND sc.student_id = #{studentId} AND sc.learning_status != 'DROPPED' AND h.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (hs.status IS NULL OR hs.status != 'DRAFT')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM exam_submission WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND (submit_time IS NOT NULL OR status IS NULL OR status != 'IN_PROGRESS')

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration), 0) AS totalStudyTime, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(COALESCE(start_time, created_time))) AS studyDays, MIN(DATE(COALESCE(start_time, created_time))) AS firstStudyDate, MAX(DATE(COALESCE(start_time, created_time))) AS lastStudyDate FROM learning_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(DATE(COALESCE(start_time, created_time)), '%Y-%m-%d') AS statDate FROM learning_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY statDate ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM student_course WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND learning_status != 'DROPPED' AND COALESCE(total_study_time, 0) > 0

SELECT student_id AS studentId, COALESCE(total_study_time, 0) AS totalStudyTime FROM student_course WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND learning_status != 'DROPPED' ORDER BY COALESCE(total_study_time, 0) DESC, student_id ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT student_id AS studentId, COALESCE(progress_percentage, 0) AS progressPercentage FROM student_course WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND learning_status != 'DROPPED' ORDER BY COALESCE(progress_percentage, 0) DESC, student_id ASC LIMIT 20
SELECT HOUR(start_time) AS hour, COALESCE(SUM(duration), 0) AS studyTime FROM learning_record WHERE course_id = #{courseId} GROUP BY HOUR(start_time) ORDER BY hour ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalStudents, COALESCE(AVG(sc.progress_percentage), 0) AS averageProgress FROM student_course sc WHERE sc.course_id = #{courseId} AND sc.learning_status != 'DROPPED'

SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(sc.progress_percentage, 0) <= 20 THEN '0-20' WHEN COALESCE(sc.progress_percentage, 0) <= 40 THEN '21-40' WHEN COALESCE(sc.progress_percentage, 0) <= 60 THEN '41-60' WHEN COALESCE(sc.progress_percentage, 0) <= 80 THEN '61-80' ELSE '81-100' END AS rangeLabel, COUNT(1) AS studentCount FROM student_course sc WHERE sc.course_id = #{courseId} AND sc.learning_status != 'DROPPED' GROUP BY CASE WHEN COALESCE(sc.progress_percentage, 0) <= 20 THEN '0-20' WHEN COALESCE(sc.progress_percentage, 0) <= 40 THEN '21-40' WHEN COALESCE(sc.progress_percentage, 0) <= 60 THEN '41-60' WHEN COALESCE(sc.progress_percentage, 0) <= 80 THEN '61-80' ELSE '81-100' END

SELECT DATE(lr.start_time) AS statDate, COALESCE(AVG(lr.video_progress), 0) AS averageProgress, COUNT(DISTINCT lr.student_id) AS activeStudents FROM learning_record lr WHERE lr.course_id = #{courseId} AND lr.start_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE(lr.start_time) ORDER BY statDate ASC

SELECT HOUR(lr.start_time) AS hour, COUNT(DISTINCT lr.student_id) AS studentCount, COALESCE(SUM(lr.duration), 0) AS studyTime FROM learning_record lr WHERE lr.course_id = #{courseId} AND lr.start_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY HOUR(lr.start_time) ORDER BY hour ASC
